name: superdev
description: 16-skill toolkit + 51 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds with a self-improving memory loop. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic (hooks auto-detect pnpm/npm/yarn/bun). v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture (opinionated structure: pages ≤ 100 lines, components ≤ 200 lines, dedicated Zustand stores per module, wizards split per-step, drawers/modals/popovers in parts/<name>/ folders with shadcn Portal primitives) and frontend-refactoring (atomic ONE-MODULE conversion in a single commit on a feature branch — deep plan, behavior baseline, atomic execute, zero-drift verify, hard rollback). Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas (now with Phase 4.5 modular-decomposition before rewiring), exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning. v1.4.0 adds a Laravel backend option — laravel-enterprise-backend (Laravel 13 + PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB + database cache/sessions + SQS; Eloquent API Resources + hand-written TS contracts; #[Audit] attribute; Title-Case enums; Laravel Boost) and laravel-bref-deploy (AWS Lambda serverless via Bref 3.x) — selectable through a backend-stack gate in the orchestrator. v1.5.0 adds design-to-laravel (Claude Design → Laravel + Inertia 3 + React 19 monolith) as the default frontend for the Laravel option, selectable via an orchestrator frontend-stack gate (Inertia vs Next.js). v1.6.0 reworks the Laravel backend to PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB (audit_logs as a hypertable with compression + retention) and Eloquent API Resources with hand-written TS contracts — dropping CockroachDB and spatie/laravel-data.
